ground_truth.title: MSI Vigor GK30 Gaming Keyboard & GM11 Gaming Mouse Combo - Mechanical Membrane Switches, 6-Zone RGB, Water Repellent & Splash-Proof, 5000 DPI - White
ground_truth.main_content: MSI Vigor GK30 Gaming Keyboard & GM11 Gaming Mouse Combo. Price: $41.99 (Save $33.00, 44% off original price of $74.99). Keyboard features: Mechanical-like plunger switches with 3-part construction, 6-zone RGB illumination with 8 lighting effects, water resistant floating keyboard design, MSI Mystic Light support, Gaming Base for stability. Mouse features: PMW-3325 Optical Sensor with up to 5000 DPI, OMRON switches lasting over 10 Million clicks, ambidextrous design, 7 lighting effects. Combo includes Vigor GK30 gaming keyboard and Clutch GM11 gaming mouse. Options: GK30 Black, GK30 White. Style: Keyboard only or Keyboard & Mouse combo. Best Seller Ranking: #2 in Gaming Keyboard. Model: S11-04US319-CLA. Keyboard Interface: USB 2.0, RGB backlit, white color, wired. Mouse: 5000 DPI optical sensor, 6 buttons, white color. Operating System: Windows 10/8.1/8/7. Warranty: 1 year parts and labor.
with: MSI Vigor GK30 Gaming Keyboard & GM11 Gaming Mouse Combo - Mechanical Membrane Switches, 6-Zone RGB, Water Repellent & Splash-Proof, 5000 DPI - White
Vigor GK30 combo us includes Vigor GK30 gaming keyboard and clutch GM11 gaming mouse, the best combo fit for PC gaming
Keyboard is equipped with special membrane switches for excellent mechanical feel
Mouse is asymmetric ergonomic design with PMW-3325 Optical Sensor delivering up to 5000 DPI
Mechanical-like plunger switches containing 3-part construction give users ideal typing experience with over 12 million life span
